Vehicle.description: Top-level vehicle branch — root of the Vehicle Signal Specification (VSS) tree.

Speed.description: Vehicle speed as reported by the Powertrain ECU via wheel speed sensors. COVESA VSS 4.x standard path: Vehicle.Speed.

Powertrain.description: Powertrain branch — covers engine/motor, transmission, and high-voltage battery signals.

TractionBattery.description: High-voltage traction battery. All signals originate from the Battery Management System (BMS) ECU.

StateOfCharge.description: State of charge signals for the traction battery.

Current.description: Current state of charge — remaining capacity as a percentage of full. Reported by the Battery Management System (BMS). COVESA VSS 4.x standard path: Vehicle.Powertrain.TractionBattery.StateOfCharge.Current.

Cabin.description: Signals related to the passenger cabin environment.

HVAC.description: Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning signals. Sources: HVAC Controller ECU.

AmbientAirTemperature.description: Current measured cabin ambient air temperature. Reported by the HVAC Controller via an interior NTC thermistor. COVESA VSS 4.x standard path: Vehicle.Cabin.HVAC.AmbientAirTemperature.
